title: keteleeria davidiana var. chien-peii
intro: Keteleeria davidiana var. chien-peii, also known as Chinese fir, is a plant species in the cypress family, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Keteleeria davidiana var. chien-peii include tea, infusion, and decoction, which are typically used in traditional Chinese medicine.
